SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.scanners

Class DkimSigningLookup

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.scanners.DkimSigningLookup
public class DkimSigningLookup extends Object
DKIM signing lookup.

Queries a SQL database to retrieve the list of DKIM signing domain and selector pairs for a given sender domain. Multiple pairs may be returned, enabling outbound emails to carry more than one DKIM signature (e.g., the sender domain key and an ESP domain key).

This class manages its own HikariDataSource connection pool, initialized lazily on first use from the provided RspamdConfig.DkimSigningConfig. The singleton instance is shared across all calls within the same JVM lifetime; call close() on server shutdown to release the pool.

The backing database schema is managed externally. A two-table reference schema for use with the Robin Management Solution would typically look like: 

 -- Maps sender domains to signing configurations.
 CREATE TABLE dkim_signing_domains (
     id       SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     domain   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE
 );

 -- Each signing entry: signing domain and selector (multiple per sender domain).
 CREATE TABLE dkim_signing_selectors (
     id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
     domain_id   INTEGER REFERENCES dkim_signing_domains(id),
     sign_domain VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
     selector    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
 );
See Also:
  • invalid reference 
    RspamdConfig.DkimSigningConfig
  • invalid reference 
    RspamdClient#addDkimSigningOption(String, String)

    • DkimSigningLookup

      private DkimSigningLookup(RspamdConfig.DkimSigningConfig config)
      Constructs a new DkimSigningLookup with a dedicated connection pool.
      Parameters:
      config - DKIM signing configuration.

    • DkimSigningLookup

      DkimSigningLookup(com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource ds, String signingQuery)

      signingQuery - SQL query string.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static DkimSigningLookup getInstance(RspamdConfig.DkimSigningConfig config)
      Returns the shared singleton instance, creating it on first call.
      Parameters:
      config - DKIM signing configuration (used only when creating the instance).
      Returns:
      Shared DkimSigningLookup instance.

    • lookup

      public List<String[]> lookup(String domain)
      Looks up all DKIM signing domain and selector pairs for the given sender domain.
      Parameters:
      domain - Sender domain to look up (e.g., "example.com").
      Returns:
      List of [domain, selector] pairs; empty list if none found or on error.

    • close

      public static void close()
      Closes the connection pool and clears the singleton instance.

      Should be called during server shutdown alongside other datasource cleanup.
